key_dungeons.name: Twisted Catacombs
key_dungeons.description: Moss-covered statues flank the entrance to Twisted Catacombs. Their blank eyes seem to follow you.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Slay the guardian of Twisted Catacombs and claim the Jade Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: A fearsome creature guards the prize.

key_dungeons.name: Frozen Barrow
key_dungeons.description: The entrance to Frozen Barrow gapes like a wound in the hillside. A cold draught carries the scent of damp stone.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Brave the depths of Frozen Barrow for the Ruby Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Few who enter these halls return unchanged.

game_log: A massive gnomish machine blocks the sun! It has 8 empty keyhole slots.
Elder Rowan: Brave adventurers, hear me! Dangerous places threaten our land: Twisted Catacombs, Frozen Barrow. Each holds an artifact we desperately need.
Elder Rowan: Will you seek them out?
Elder Rowan: Thank you, brave souls! I've marked the locations on your map. Be careful out there!
You descend into Twisted Catacombs - Floor 1... No torch equipped!
The party opened a treasure chest and found 22 gold.
Merry picked the lock! (9 picks left)
The party opened a treasure chest and found 13 gold and Healing Herb.
The party opened a treasure chest and found 14 gold and Leather.
The party opened a treasure chest and found 24 gold.
Merry picked the lock! (8 picks left)
The party opened a treasure chest and found 17 gold and Dagger.
The party opened a treasure chest and found 12 gold and Dagger.
The party opened a treasure chest and found 11 gold and Mace.
Merry picked the lock! (7 picks left)
The party opened a treasure chest and found 5 gold and Healing Herb.
Found the Key! A portal appears!
The portal returns you to the surface!
A perfectly still pool of dark water in a forest clearing. Your reflection stares back, but its expression doesn't match yours.
Your reflection speaks: 'I see what you seek. The Realm of Shadow stirs. Three seals bind it. Break them... or don't.'
Elder Rowan: You recovered the Key! Here is 150 gold for your bravery!
Elder Rowan: There are still 1 dungeon to clear. We're counting on you!
Freshly disturbed earth beneath a distinctive lightning-struck oak. Someone has been burying things here.
You dig beneath the tree and unearth a leather satchel filled with stolen goods.
You descend into Frozen Barrow - Floor 1... No torch equipped!
The party rests using Camping Supplies...
Restored 17 HP and 13 MP across the party!
The party rests using Camping Supplies...
Restored 1 HP and 8 MP across the party!
The party opened a treasure chest and found 11 gold.
The party opened a treasure chest and found 24 gold and Club.
Merry failed to pick the lock. (16 picks left)
Merry failed to pick the lock. (15 picks left)
Merry failed to pick the lock. (14 picks left)
Merry failed to pick the lock. (13 picks left)
Merry failed to pick the lock. (12 picks left)
Merry picked the lock! (11 picks left)
The party opened a treasure chest and found 19 gold.
Found the Ruby Key! A portal appears!
The portal returns you to the surface!
Elder Rowan: You recovered the Ruby Key! Here is 150 gold for your bravery!
A ring of stones surrounds cold ashes. This was an adventurer's camp, perhaps not long ago.
You rekindle the fire and rest for a while. The warmth soothes aching muscles.
Pella: I've been hearing reports of Orcs lurking in a dungeon nearby.
Pella: Could you clear out 3 of them before they become a bigger threat?
Pella: Thank you! I've marked a suspicious location on your map. Be careful down there!
A perfect circle of pale mushrooms grows in the grass. The air inside the ring shimmers faintly.
You step into the fairy ring. Tiny lights swirl around you and your senses sharpen.
You descend into Hunt the Orcs - Level 1... No torch equipped!
Merry picked the lock! (10 picks left)
Merry picked the lock! (9 picks left)
The party opened a treasure chest and found 7 gold.
The party opened a treasure chest and found 22 gold and Short Bow.
The party opened a treasure chest and found 13 gold.
The party defeated Wolves and Goblins.
The party opened a treasure chest and found 14 gold and Leather.
Merry picked the lock! (8 picks left)
Merry picked the lock! (7 picks left)
The party opened a treasure chest and found 7 gold and Torch.
Stairs up! Press ESC to leave.
Three tall standing stones arranged in a triangle. When the wind blows through them, you can almost hear words.
The stones whisper: 'Seek the shadow beneath the mountain. The key lies where light cannot reach.'
A crude lean-to shelter beside a smouldering fire. Animal bones hang from strings. Someone lives here, barely.
A wild-eyed old man peers at you from behind a tree. 'You seek the Shadow? Fool. But I can help... for a price.'
The party rests using Camping Supplies...
Restored 15 HP and 14 MP across the party!

Restored 0 HP and 4 MP across the party!
Aldric: Our well water grows darker by the day. Please hurry and find that relic!
